note: CANONICAL BACKUP — generated from source of truth. Do NOT edit this file directly.

specials.name: Amphibious
specials.desc: Can enter water at half Speed. Not a true watercraft — limited to calm conditions.

specials.name: Four Wheel Drive
specials.desc: Halve Difficult Ground movement penalties (round down).

specials.name: All-Terrain
specials.desc: Ignore Difficult Ground penalties entirely. Designed for rough country.

specials.name: STOL
specials.desc: Short Takeoff and Landing. Needs only half the normal runway distance.

specials.name: Unpowered
specials.desc: No propulsion system. Drifts with current, wind, or gravity. Effective Speed 0.

specials.name: Shallow Draft
specials.desc: Can navigate rivers, shallows, and coastal waters inaccessible to deeper-hulled vessels.

specials.name: Deep Draft
specials.desc: Requires deep water. Cannot enter shallows, rivers, or shallow harbours without risk of grounding.

specials.name: Open Top
specials.desc: No overhead cover. Crew can be targeted directly. Ranged attacks against crew ignore vehicle Armour.

specials.name: Enclosed
specials.desc: Sealed cabin. Crew protected from weather, debris, and environmental hazards.

specials.name: Cramped
specials.desc: Tight interior. –1 to all physical actions performed inside the vehicle.

specials.name: Spacious
specials.desc: Generous interior. Crew can move freely, change positions, even sleep aboard.

specials.name: Ejection System
specials.desc: Pilot can eject as a free action. Lands safely on a Piloting roll at –2.

specials.name: Cargo Bay
specials.desc: Internal bay large enough to carry smaller vehicles, mounts, or bulk cargo.

specials.name: Heavy Armor
specials.desc: Only Heavy Weapons can damage this vehicle. Halves collision damage from non-Heavy Armor vehicles.

specials.name: Sealed
specials.desc: Airtight. Proof against gas, vacuum, NBC hazards. Requires life support for extended use.

specials.name: Pressurised
specials.desc: Maintains internal pressure at altitude or depth. Breach causes explosive decompression.

specials.name: Fireproof
specials.desc: Resistant to fire and incendiary weapons. Halve fire damage.

specials.name: Waterproof
specials.desc: Survives immersion without damage. Electronics and cargo protected from water.

specials.name: Ram Plate
specials.desc: Reinforced prow or bumper. +2 damage on ram attacks. Vehicle takes half ram damage.

specials.name: Long Range
specials.desc: Extended fuel capacity or efficient engines. Double normal operational range.

specials.name: Short Range
specials.desc: Limited endurance. Half normal operational range. Common in fighters and interceptors.

specials.name: Stealth
specials.desc: Low observable profile. –2 to Notice or Electronics rolls to detect this vehicle.

specials.name: Loud
specials.desc: Extremely noisy. +2 to Notice rolls to detect. Can be heard long before it arrives.

specials.name: Night Operations
specials.desc: Equipped for darkness. Headlights, IR systems, or NV as standard. No darkness penalties for driver.

specials.name: Smoke Screen
specials.desc: Deploy smoke as a free action. Creates a LBT of obscuring smoke that lasts 3 rounds.

specials.name: Flares / Chaff
specials.desc: Countermeasures against guided missiles. Electronics roll to spoof incoming guided weapons.

specials.name: Towing Capacity
specials.desc: Rated for towing. Can tow another vehicle up to its own Size without penalty.

specials.name: Temperamental
specials.desc: Has a personality. Responds to its handler and may refuse strangers. Treat as a character for social purposes.

specials.name: Famous / Infamous
specials.desc: This vehicle is well-known. +2 or –2 to social interactions depending on reputation and audience.

specials.name: Cursed
specials.desc: Something is wrong with this vehicle. The GM draws a card each session — on a Club, something goes wrong.

specials.name: Haunted
specials.desc: Inhabited by a presence. Lights flicker, instruments drift, voices in the static. May help or hinder.

specials.name: Sentient
specials.desc: The vehicle has its own mind. It has a Spirit die and may cooperate, argue, or refuse orders.

specials.name: Unreliable System
specials.desc: One specific system fails on snake eyes. Specify which system when this ability is taken.

specials.name: Prototype
specials.desc: One of a kind or experimental. Spare parts unavailable. Repair at –2 but the vehicle has capabilities nothing else does.
